use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Acting as call-to-action buttons in landing pages
Navigating users between pages or views
Toggling UI states like modals or dropdowns
Serving as primitive building block for composite components like payment cards
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for styling, and includes accessible focus states with ring outlines. Designed as an atomic UI primitive commonly used within payment card interfaces and form components.
